details.effect: [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.
Storm. On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field. Combo (3) - Deal it 4 damage. On Super-Evolve - Give each other Condemned follower on your field Storm.
[fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. [lastwords] Summon this.

[fanfare] Banish 2 cards named Puppet from your EX area: Put a Victoria token into your EX area. [act] [engage]: Select up to 2 cards named Puppet on your field and give them [attack]+1/[defense]+1. Activate only if there are at least 3 Puppetry cards in your cemetery.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Whenever a Condemned follower on your field evolves, Combo (3) - Draw a card.
Whenever a Condemned follower on your field evolves, Combo (3) - Draw a card. On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
Ward. [fanfare]/[lastwords] Deal 3 damage to each enemy leader. [act] Discard this: Select a Condemned follower on your field and destroy it. Deal 1 damage to each enemy leader. Draw a card.
Search your deck for a 3-cost or less card with "Orchis" in its name and a 3-cost or less card with "Zwei" in its name, summon them, then shuffle. Put 2 Puppet tokens into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this. [fanfare], Combo (3) - Evolve this.
On Evolve - Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Condemned card from among them and add it to hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
Whenever a Condemned follower on your field evolves, select an enemy follower on the field. Combo (3) - Deal it 3 damage. [fanfare] The next Condemned card you play this turn costs 1 less to play.
Summon 2 Puppet tokens. Give each Puppetry token follower on your field [attack]+2 and Assail.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Ward. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.
Ward. On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage.
Rush. [fanfare] Draw 2 cards.
[fanfare] Discard a Puppetry card: Draw a card. Put 2 Puppet tokens into your EX area.
Rush. [fanfare] Select another card on your field not named Support Troop Elf and return it to its owner's hand.
Return a card on your field to its owner's hand: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 6 damage. Deal 2 damage to its leader.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Loot cards in your EX area cost 1 less to play. [fanfare] Put a Dread Pirate's Flag token into your EX area.

Loot cards in your EX area cost 1 less to play. Whenever you play a Loot card during your turn, choose 1 that you haven't already chosen this turn. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. (2) Each opponent buries the top 2 cards of their deck. (3) Recover 2 play points.

Storm. Ward. Strike - If there are 10 [swordcraft] followers on your field and/or in your EX area, refresh this. Activate only twice per turn. [fanfare] If there are at least 5 [swordcraft] followers on your field and/or in your EX area, banish each enemy follower on the field.
[evolve] [cost02]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Summon a Steelclad Knight and Knight token. If there are 5 [swordcraft] cards on your field, evolve this.
On Evolve - Deal 4 damage to each enemy follower on the field. Deal 2 damage to each enemy leader.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Ward. [fanfare] Put the top card of your deck into your EX area.
Ward. On Evolve - Choose 1. (1) Search your deck for a Warden of Honor, summon it, then shuffle. (2) [cost03]: Search your deck for a Radiel, Valorous Enforcer, summon it, then shuffle.
Whenever you play a Dread Pirate's Flag, select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage. [fanfare] Put a Dread Pirate's Flag token into your EX area.
[fanfare] Search your deck for a Maid follower, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle. [act] [cost01], [engage]: You may summon a Nonja, Silent Maid from your hand. If you do, give it Ward.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Put a Dread Pirate's Flag token into your EX area.
On Evolve - Search your deck for a follower with both the Condemned and Thief traits, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle.
[fanfare] Put a Dread Pirate's Flag token into your EX area.
Select an Officer follower in your cemetery. Put it into your EX area and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Storm. Strike - Draw a card.
Storm. Strike - Draw a card. On Evolve - Deal 1 damage to each enemy follower on the field.
Rush. [lastwords] Put a Gilded Blade token into your EX area.
Ward. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it and its leader 3 damage.
Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 2 damage and draw a card. If there's a Ninja follower on your field, deal 3 damage instead.
Select an enemy follower on the field. Summon a Shield Guardian and a Knight token. Deal damage to the selected follower equal to the number of [swordcraft] followers on your field.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Remove a fusion counter from this: Summon a Multi-Headed Test Subject token. Activate, Fusion 1 non-token follower: Put a fusion counter on this. If you fused with a Condemned follower, draw a card.

On Evolve - Choose 1. If there are at least 10 Condemned followers in your cemetery, choose up to 2 instead. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage. (2) Summon a Multi-Headed Test Subject token. On Super-Evolve - Select up to 2 Volunteer Test Subject or Multi-Headed Test Subject on your field and give them Storm.
This costs 1 less to play for every pair of a Mage follower and a Mage spell in your cemetery. Storm. Bane. Ward.
Storm. Strike - Give each other Machina follower on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+1. [fanfare] Search your deck for a Warden of the Trigger, summon it, then shuffle.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Remove a fusion counter from this: Summon a Multi-Headed Test Subject token. Activate, Fusion 1 non-token follower: Put a fusion counter on this.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. [act] [engage]: Select a Volunteer Test Subject or Multi-Headed Test Subject on your field and give it Drain.

[fanfare] Look at the top card of your deck. If it's a Machina card, you may put it into your EX area. [act] [engage]: Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it. Activate only if you have a 6-cost or greater Machina follower on your field.

[fanfare] Deal 2 damage to each enemy follower on the field. Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Mage card from among them and add it to your hand. Bury the rest. The next 3-cost or less Mage card you play this turn costs 3 less to play.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Remove a fusion counter from this: Summon a Multi-Headed Test Subject token. Activate, Fusion 1 non-token follower: Put a fusion counter on this.

On Evolve - Search your deck for a Volunteer Test Subject, put it into your EX area, then shuffle. [act] [engage] and bury a Volunteer Test Subject or Multi-Headed Test Subject on your field: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the attack of the buried follower.

When this card is fused by your Condemned follower's ability, draw a card, then discard a card. [fanfare] If there are at least 5 Condemned followers in your cemetery, give this[attack]+2/[defense]+2 and Rush. If there are at least 10, give this Assail and Bane. [lastwords] Draw a card.
Ward. [fanfare] Select a follower on your field. Reveal the top card of your deck and give the selected follower 🛡️+X. X equals the revealed card's cost. Draw a card.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.
On Evolve - Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
[fanfare] Summon a Magic Sediment token. [act] [cost05], Earth Rite: Summon 3 Guardform Golem or Strikeform Golem tokens.
Storm. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. [act] [cost01], discard this: Search your deck for a Witch's Cauldron, summon it, then shuffle.
Search your deck for an Electrokitty, put it into your EX area, then shuffle. Spellchain (7) - It costs 1 less to play this turn.
Select an enemy follower on the field. Draw a card. Deal damage to the selected follower equal to the number of cards in your hand.
This can't be played from the EX area. [fanfare] Bury 2 Condemned cards in your EX area: Give this Storm and Drain. [lastwords] Put this into its owner's EX area.
This can't be played from the EX area. [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Ward. This can't be destroyed by abilities. [lastwords] Put this into its owner's EX area.

Ward. This can't be destroyed by abilities. On Evolve - Bury 2 Condemned cards in your EX area: Give each enemy follower on the field 🗡️-5/🛡️-5. Give your leader [defense]+5. [lastwords] Put this into its owner's EX area.
Assail. Bane. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 Draconic Duelist cards on your field, give this Storm.

This can't be played from the EX area. [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Bury a Condemned card in your EX area: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. [lastwords] Put this into its owner's EX area.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage. [lastwords] Put this into its owner's EX area.

Whenever a Megalorca is put onto your field, give it Storm. Give your leader [defense]+1. [fanfare] Put a Megalorca token into your EX area. If Overflow is active for you, summon a Megalorca token. [act] [cost00]: The next Marine card you play from your EX area this turn costs 1 less to play. Activate only once per turn.

This can't be played from the EX area. Ward. [fanfare] Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Condemned card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. [lastwords] Put this into its owner's EX area.

This can't be played from the EX area. Rush. Assail. [lastwords] Put this into its owner's EX area.
Each Megalorca on your field has Rush and Assail. [fanfare] Summon 2 Megalorca tokens. Put the top card of your deck into your EX area.

Select up to 2 enemy followers on the field and deal them each 6 damage. You may discard a card. If you do and the discarded card is a Dragonewt follower, deal 2 damage to each enemy leader.
This costs 1 less to play from your EX area. Summon a Megalorca token. Draw a card. If Overflow is active for you, summon a Megalorca token.

Once on each of your turns, whenever you have at least 10 cards in your cemetery and another 3-cost or lower Condemned follower on your field is put into the cemetery, summon it. Its [fanfare] abilities don't activate. [fanfare] Bury the top 2 cards of your deck. [act] [engage] and bury a Condemned follower on your field not named Istyndet, Soul Convict: Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it.

[fanfare] If you have 2 or less cards in your hand, search your deck for up to 1 Paracelise, Demon of Greed and put it into your EX area. Whenever a follower on your field is summoned, if it was summoned from the cemetery, deal 1 damage to each enemy follower on the field. [fanfare] Discard a Condemned card: Draw a card. [act] [engage]: Select a 5-cost or lower Condemned follower and a 3-cost or lower Condemned follower from your cemetery and summon them.
At the start of your end phase, give each enemy follower on the field 🗡️-3/🛡️-3. Deal 3 damage to each enemy leader.

Ward. [fanfare] Draw a card. If there's a Myroel, Death Enforcer on your field, give your leader [defense]+4.

Your cards named Garodeth, Insurgent Convict cost 1 less to play. Four times on each of your turns, whenever your leader's defense decreases, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage. [fanfare] Deal 1 damage to your leader. Draw a card.
